dashboard_subtitle: Here's an overview of your site today
welcome_description: Manage your content easily from this interface.
extensions_locked_hint: Extensions Creator is locked. Activate a valid license to create and manage your extension packages.
confirm_delete_extension: Delete this extension package from your personal space?
maintenance_description: Enable maintenance mode to make the site inaccessible to visitors.
maintenance_toggled: Maintenance mode has been updated successfully.
admin_tour_module_filters_content: Start by filtering by status, type, category, or keyword before editing.
admin_tour_module_list_content: This area contains your items. Open the relevant rows, then choose the right target.
admin_tour_module_actions_content: Use these actions to edit, moderate, activate, or delete without leaving the module.
admin_tour_module_stats_content: These counters help you prioritize work and track progress.
admin_tour_module_installer_content: Import ZIP packages here to add modules, themes, or assets, then activate them.
admin_tour_module_controls_content: Use this bar to search, filter, expand, collapse, and focus on precise subsets.
admin_tour_module_audit_content: Run an audit before publishing to detect errors, warnings, and compatibility issues.
admin_tour_module_report_content: Fix blocking points from this report first, then regenerate a clean package.
admin_tour_module_tabs_content: Move tab by tab to configure the CMS by domain without missing critical options.
admin_tour_module_workflow_content: Suggested order: filter, review, act, save, then verify results.
admin_tour_dashboard_welcome_content: This banner summarizes your current workspace and the global CMS status.
admin_tour_dashboard_maintenance_content: Enable or disable maintenance mode here to control public access to the site.
admin_tour_dashboard_stats_content: These cards show core volumes (pages, posts, media, users) with direct navigation.
admin_tour_dashboard_chart_content: This chart helps you quickly understand content balance and where to focus next.
admin_tour_dashboard_recent_content: Use this area to resume quickly from the latest published or edited content.
admin_tour_dashboard_quick_actions_conte: These shortcuts let you create content or jump to key admin sections in one click.
admin_tour_dashboard_system_content: Monitor essential technical indicators here to keep the CMS stable.
admin_tour_dashboard_final_content: On every new page you open, this same contextual help will be available with the option to start that section tutorial.
admin_tour_module_translations_content: Switch between locales here. You can review Source, To create, or Translated status without leaving the form.
admin_tour_dashboard_backups_content: This block opens the Backups module to create an archive, restore a site, or start a secured reset. The right habit is to create a backup before any heavy change affecting content or media.
admin_tour_dashboard_extensions_content: This card centralizes your generated extensions so you can edit, download, or publish them from one place.
dashboard_onboarding_content: Follow this checklist to make the instance ready to publish, receive messages, and stay safely backed up.
dashboard_onboarding_complete_content: The essential setup is in place. You can now go deeper on content, translations, and advanced modules.
dashboard_onboarding_branding_content: Add the site name, slogan, and logo so both the admin and the frontend have a clear identity.
dashboard_onboarding_homepage_content: Select which page should answer on the site root so navigation is stable from the first visit.
dashboard_onboarding_menu_content: Add at least a few entries to the main menu so the site is navigable from the first publication.
dashboard_onboarding_email_content: Check the sender and mail transport so forms, notifications, and system tests can be delivered correctly.
dashboard_onboarding_content_content: Create at least one published page or post so the frontend has a real starting point.
dashboard_onboarding_backups_content: Generate a full ZIP archive before the first migrations, tests, or structural changes.
